Package lu.kbra.pclib.listener

Interface Event

All Known Subinterfaces:
P4JClientEvent, P4JConnectionEvent, P4JEvent, P4JServerEvent, PacketEvent, PacketEvent.PostPacketEvent, PacketEvent.PrePacketEvent, PacketEvent.ReadPacketEvent, PacketEvent.WritePacketEvent
All Known Implementing Classes:
P4JConnectionEvent.ClientConnectedEvent, P4JConnectionEvent.ClientDisconnectedEvent, PacketEvent.PreReadPacketEvent, PacketEvent.PreWritePacketEvent, PacketEvent.ReadFailedPacketEvent, PacketEvent.ReadSuccessPacketEvent, PacketEvent.WriteFailedPacketEvent, PacketEvent.WriteSuccessPacketEvent, ServerClosedEvent
public interface Event
